## High self-cleaning abilities
Similar to other genuine SiO₂-based coatings, Q² Rim offers superb self-cleaning abilities, reducing the time required to maintain wheels, especially those with intricate patterns, in impeccable cleanliness. It shields against excessive dust from brake pads depositing on wheel rims and facilitates easy cleaning with pressurized clean water. Additionally, using a pH-neutral rim cleaning product further streamlines the entire maintenance process. Unlike conventional rim protection solutions, Q² Rim is also resistant to more aggressive cleaners.
CONSUMPTION: 15ml / set
TEMPERATURE RESISTANCE: >800'C
PH TOLERANCE: 2-11
DURABILITY: 12 ~ 24 months / 45k km

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-rim.jpg?v=1702150076&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-rim-ceramic-coating.jpg?v=1702150076&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-rim-ceramic-banner.jpg?v=1702150076&width=2400)

BEST PRACTICES & PRO-TIPS
Q² Rim EVO requires only one thick layer, but if you desire to prolong its durability, the product can be layered. Allow a minimum of a 1-hour period between layers. The coating is suitable for application on all finishes of glossy and matte rims. 
**TIP:** Apply Q² Rim in sections. Since it is a drying and curing formula, large and intricately shaped rims should be divided into numerous smaller sections.

[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-iron-wheel-cleaner.jpg?v=1702150596&width=1080)

](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-q2m-iron-redefined)

## Iron Cleaner
Preparation is key to proper coating adhesion. Use GYEON Iron Remover to thoroughly clean and prep the surface.

[
Shop GYEON Iron Remover
](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-q2m-iron-redefined)

](https://carzilla.ca/pages/search-results-page?q=gyeon%20coating%20applicator)

## Safe on brake calipers
Streak-free and will not strip coatings. Safe on tint.

[
Shop extra applicators

](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-wetcoat-500ml-new-upgraded-version-2019)

## WetCoat
Gyeon WetCoat is essential for coating and maintaining wheels. It's a straightforward spray and rinse off process.

[
Shop GYEON Wet Coat
](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-wetcoat-500ml-new-upgraded-version-2019)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-rim-ceramic-coating-banner.jpg?v=1702150155&width=2400)

TEMPERATURE RESISTANT
Wheels, following the engine bay, brake calipers, and exhausts, are the components most exposed to high temperatures. Q² Rim exhibits an endurance capability that exceeds 800ºC without compromising its original properties. The exclusive dedication of this ceramic coating to rims is an asset and introduces a new level of quality within the realm of rim protection.
**Scroll down for detailer reviews and FAQs.**

Description

## GYEON RIM EVO - Super Hard rim ceramic coating

There are various types of wheel rims available on the market, such as wet painted, powder coated, anodized, or polished. Q² Rim EVO is a suitable product to protect each of them. Thanks to its enhanced formula, the increased self-cleaning properties result in reduced grime and brake dust deposits, requiring less frequent wash maintenance.

CAPACITIES: 30 ML

BOX CONTAINS: Q² RIM EVO / APPLICATOR SET / MANUAL

**ENHANCING EFFECT & HIGH-TEMPERATURE RESISTANCE: **Wheels are the components most exposed to temperature cycles, closely following the engine bay and exhausts. These surfaces undergo rapid changes in temperature range. Q² Rim EVO exhibits an endurance capability that exceeds 800°C without compromising its original properties. Additionally, Q² Rim EVO does not impart gloss to any surface but instead contributes depth and a darkening effect to any color or finish.

**EVO STANDS FOR EVOLUTION:** In 2021, GYEON took a significant leap forward by revamping our entire paint coating lineup, now collectively known as EVO. Two years later, GYEON takes pride in having achieved similar advancements with the remainder of our coatings. All EVO coatings guarantee ease of application and boast up to 50% more durability and resistance in everyday use.

**BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN: **Q² Rim EVO requires only one thick layer, but if you desire to prolong its durability, the product can be layered. Allow a minimum of a 1-hour period between layers. The coating is suitable for application on all finishes of glossy and matte rims. TIP: Apply Q² Rim in sections. Since it is a drying and curing formula, large and intricately shaped rims should be divided into numerous smaller sections.****

CONSUMPTION: 15-20ml / set
TEMPERATURE RESISTANCE: >800'C
PH TOLERANCE: 2-11
DURABILITY: up to 18 months/45k km

All GYEON products does ***not ***contain any Per- and Polyfluoroalkyl Substances (PFAS / 'forever chemicals') as defined or restricted under the relevant Canadian environmental and chemical management regulations, including but not limited to:

- The Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999 (CEPA) and its associated

- Prohibition of Certain Toxic Substances Regulations, 2012 (SOR/2012-285), as amended;

- The Domestic Substances List and Non-domestic Substances List under CEPA;
Any applicable federal or provincial restrictions pertaining to PFAS substances.

Application

Consider if you've already clayed, ironed, and prepped the wheel; the next steps are fairly easy. It's a simple apply and wipe off process. GYEON Rim reacts and adheres quickly, eliminating the need to let the product sit for 5 minutes before wiping off. Simply work in small sections and casually wipe it off as you go.

Outdoor-friendly application

All GYEON coatings can be applied outdoors. Ensure stable conditions, never use in direct sunlight and check the weather forecast! 

Multi-surface protection

Brake calipers, wheels, chrome, aluminum, powder coat—all okay. While some paint coatings can be applied to wheels, GYEON Rim is formulated to adhere to different types of surfaces with varying surface porosity, ensuring longer-lasting protection in high-wear areas.

What's new in the EVO version?

Increased 'heat-cycles' (repeated heat and cool cycle) tolerance as well as increased durability by 50%.
In 2021, GYEON took a significant leap forward by revamping our entire paint coating lineup, now collectively known as EVO. Two years later, GYEON takes pride in having achieved similar advancements with the remainder of our coatings. All EVO coatings guarantee ease of application and boast up to 50% more durability and resistance in everyday use.

## GYEON Rim FAQs

How long does it last?

This depends on several factors. On high-wear areas such as wheels, brake calipers, and exhausts, GYEON Rim can last at least around one year, and this duration can be extended to two years with multi-layers. Further extension is possible with proper maintenance using GYEON WetCoat.

Does it add 'gloss' to matte rims?

No, but it will enhance the matte finish to a richer appearance, similar to applying lotion on dry hands. GYEON Rim is fully matte compatible.

When do I wipe it off?

Work in small areas, tackling 2 to 4 spokes at a time, and promptly wipe off GYEON Rim right away, no need to wait for it to 'flash'.

What's the layering time?

Layering time is between 1 to 4 hours, and full curing occurs within 48 hours. You can take the vehicle out after 12 hours.

How much will the bottle do?

30ml will be sufficient to cover a set of four typical 19" x 9" wheels with two coats. Or 8 rims.

Can it be sprayed on?

It can be applied using an airbrush for high-complexity wheels.

After coating, when can I bring the vehicle out?

The vehicle can be driven the next day, or approximately 12 hours later. It is advisable to avoid exposing the coating to water within the first 24 hours.

How cold (or hot) can I apply the coating under?

A temperature of at least 10°C is recommended, although you can still attempt the application between 5°C to 10°C if necessary. If the temperature reaches 30°C, then it's on the warmer side, and you will need to retreat into the shade.

What do I maintain it with and how often?

Either maintain with GYEON WetCoat or Bathe+; both products can be used as often as you like.

I have a 'high-spot', what do I do?

High spots refer to dried coatings that were not completely buffed off. If you catch the high spots within 30 minutes, you can use the coating itself again to level/soften the high spots. If it's been a few days, then you'll need to mechanically polish it off or use Gyeon Total Remover to remove and reapply coating on the affected area.

What's the expiration date? New and opened.

Officially, Gyeon recommends the product to be used within 2 to 3 years when new. If the bottle has been opened, it's best to use up the product in 1 to 2 months to preserve the coating's maximum effectiveness.

Can it be shipped in the cold?

No problem at all. Coatings contain a significant amount of solvents and exhibit high chemical stability. For more details regarding winter shipping, please refer to our FAQ section on winter shipping.

Anything else I should know?

GYEON Rim will likely become your motorcycle's best friend, as it can be applied to exhausts and all metal parts. If you have an airbrush, coating the entire motor compartment becomes a breeze.
Rim can also be applied to matte or satin wheels without adding additional 'sheen'. What it does, however, is enrich matte finishes and prevent them from looking too 'chalky'.
